title: Agadir, Souss-Massa — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Agadir, Souss-Massa: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Agadir is a city in Souss-Massa with a population of 421,000. A popular beach resort city on the Atlantic coast, known for its modern architecture, wide beaches, and year-round sunshine.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
